title: Archer Aviation Inc. (ACHR) Reports Q1 Loss, Misses Revenue Estimates
text: Archer Aviation (ACHR) reported a quarterly loss of $0.21 per share, beating expectations. The company was projected to lose $0.25 per share, representing a 14.29% positive surprise. This marked an improvement from the $0.13 per-share loss recorded in the year-ago quarter. The aerospace-defense firm generated $1.6 million in quarterly revenue, falling short of consensus estimates by approximately 12%. This represented the company's first revenue generation, compared to zero revenues in the prior-year period. Archer Aviation shares have underperformed significantly, declining 13.8% year-to-date versus the S&P 500's 8.1% gain. The stock received a Zacks Rank #3 (Hold) rating, suggesting expected performance in line with broader market trends. Analysts project the company will post a loss of $0.26 per share on $2.84 million in revenue for the upcoming quarter, with full-year estimates of negative $1.03 earnings per share on $15.61 million in revenues.
